summary: Generated the requested single runnable helper script artifact as a parameter-driven wrapper that prefers the reviewed repository delegate, enforces reviewable evidence gates, preserves traceability, uses explicit timeout handling, and reports partial honestly for dry-run/zero-PDF/partial delegate outcomes.
notes: Produced exactly one script artifact at the expected path.
The script is designed to reuse artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py via a portable path resolution strategy relative to the wrapper/repository, not Path.cwd().

Wrapper logic is parameter-driven for input_dir and output_xlsx, preserves incoming traceability context, uses --report-json for delegate handoff, parses JSON from stdout directly when available, and applies stronger success evidence gates before claiming success.
Dry-run short-circuit and zero-PDF discovery are represented as partial with structured summary and no false XLSX success claim.
Delegate subprocess execution is bounded by an explicit timeout and timeout is reported honestly.
